entry.title: S4 HANA Cost Center Activity Rate Calculation Hybrid Approach
entry.content:
With the advent of S4 HANA, the approach to planning is constantly evolving. In-memory computing, columnar database storage, and newer tables with each version of S4 HANA are making planning more flexible and efficient. Financial planners and cost accountants are looking for more Microsoft Excel-like planning tools for their processes. SAP Analytics Cloud is also offering much flexibility to businesses as a planning tool. The new planning tables in the S4 HANA ERP system, ACDOCP, and ACCOSTRATE have made their mark in a typical S4 HANA environment. Amid all these innovations, the cost accounting business function still wonders how these tools will, and tables come into play to help with the cost center planning around overheads, and their absorption into a product cost to reflect the contribution margin. This blog will demystify the S4 HANA planning approach and lay out an approach to Integrate cost center planning concerning product cost planning.

Before S4 HANA, during SAP ECC days, cost accountants usually would use the standard transaction codes such as KP26, and KP06 to load plan activity type dependent and independent data in terms of quantity (volume) and plan costs. Typically, a cost-center plan cycle would be something like as shown in Figure 1. This process diagram has simplified a few sub-processes such as planning of volume or Input Quantities for the cost centers/activity types that could be planned and transferred using the SAP long-term planning (LTP) or even through a manual upload. Nevertheless, the basic high-level steps remain as shown in Figure 1.

Figure 1: Typical SAP ECC Cost Center Planning

 

 

Currently, with S4 HANA (up to version 2022), there are a couple of new CO or managerial accounting planning tables that are built on the premise of in-memory processing. These tables are ACDOCP and ACCOSTRATE. Many of the Fiori plan versus actual comparison apps run based on these AC* tables. SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) also Integrates with these tables better. Additionally, the S4 HANA most powerful allocation tool i.e. universal allocation or manage allocation also uses these tables. Based on all these contexts, cost-center planning processes are designed around these tables. While following this approach, the cost center activity type-driven overhead allocations become problematic. Till the latest version of S4 HANA, the cost center activity type automatic rates calculation transactions or corresponding Fiori apps are still all original old school CO tables based. To address this type of limitation a hybrid approach can be adopted. Adopting such a hybrid approach will result in the best of both worlds based on the current system design. Figure 2 process flow summarizes the high-level system design.

Figure 2: New S4 HANA Hybrid Cost Center Activity Type Rate Automation

 

This hybrid approach circles around the following main steps:

  • First, the cost center and activity type volume or quantities are loaded to S4 CO tables using standard transaction codes such as KP26.
  • The cost center plan load can be performed using the Fiori app called “import financial Plan Data” – This app would take Excel or .csv file load which can be easily set up. This app would load data into the ACDOCP table.
  • During this process if any SKF (statistical Key Figures) would be necessary, then that would be an additional step to load the plan SKF data through the Fiori app “import Statistical Key Figure Plan Data.”
    1. Pre-requisites for this step would be to create SKF master data using transaction codes such as KK01.
    2. After the plan data is loaded into the Fiori app, an existing S4 transfer program can be used to transfer the plan SKF values from the FINSSKF table to the COSF table.

 

  • Next, the cost center plan data is transferred from ACDOCP to CO tables – This task could have been very time-consuming and expensive to develop but luckily S4 HANA comes with many standard transfer report programs that can be used without any changes to transfer plan data from ACDOCP table to CO.
    1. Three Transfer programs from AC tables to CO tables are available.
      1.       R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_CO_S4H_2_ERP (CO Activity Independent Data Transfer)
      2.       R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_ACTOUT_2_ERP (Activity Type Dependent Data from S4 to CO)
      3.       R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_SKF_S4H_ERP (SKF plan data to CO)
  • Next, as the plan data now resides in CO tables, the rest of the cost center/activity type plan functions such as cost splitting among activity types or any plan reconciliation can be performed using the old school CO transactions such as KSS4.
  • Cost Center Activity type rate calculation would be run next using S4 transaction KSPI.
  • After this step, cost center plan data along with the activity type rates can be transferred back to ACDOCP, etc. S4HANA tables using the S4 delivered standard programs. As mentioned earlier, these programs would require very little customization to deploy in the existing S4 ecosystem
    1.       R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_CO_ERP_2_S4H (CO plan data from CO tables to S4H)
    2.       R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_ACTY_ERP_S4H (CO tables to ACCOSTRATE)

Figure 3 shows the First transfer program that moves the cost center plan data from the ACDOCP table to the CO table.

Figure 3 shows the program R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_CO_S4H_2_ERP

 

Figure 4 shows the transfer program that moves the cost center/activity type dependent plan data from the ACDOCP table to the CO table.

Figure 4 shows the program R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_ACTOUT_2_ERP

 

Figure 5 shows the Statistical Key Figure (SKF) plan data transfer from the FINSSKF table to the COSR table.

Figure 5 shows the program R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_SKF_S4H_ERP

 

Figure 6 shows the transfer program that moves the cost center/activity type plan data from the CO table to ACDOCP.

Figure 6 shows the program R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_ACTOUT_2_ERP

 

Figure 7 shows the transfer program that moves the cost center/activity type plan rates data from the CO tables to ACDOCP.

Figure 7 shows the program R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_ACTY_ERP_S4H

 

In conclusion, I would like to mention that using the above-suggested hybrid approach, the old-school CO/ERP transactions could be very well integrated with the modern-day S4 transactions/app. This also offers scalability to Integrate the planning with SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC).

entry.title: Re: Tracker Record Creation using “Benefit Eligibility Date Configuration Object” for Benefits, whos
entry.content: Great. Keep going

entry.title: Timeline for Story Report scheduling to SFTP
entry.content:
Topic - Timeline for Story Report scheduling to SFTP

If SFTP is not in road map then how Canvas Reports will be decommissioning in 2025? How should we schedule our story reports to SFTP? In that case will SAP stop the decommissioning Table & Canvas Report?

Reference SAP Ticket - 250701/2024

Enhancement - https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/310960 [554 Customer Votes]

Regards,
Arijit Sardar

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Gerhard,

advanced intercompany sales in Intercompany Sales,

supplier invoice(Miro)  will be automatically created when IV2 billing is established,but for the miro heaer reference field we need to enter invoice number , not the standard billing number , so we want to create miro by manually.

Is it possible to disconnect miro for advanced intercompany sales in SAP S/4HANA?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2023年07月 – 2023年09月
entry.content:
本文主要收集了与集成扩展相关的常见问题(2023年07月 – 2023年09月)，按照主要问询对象API，CDS View，CPI，自定义字段和逻辑以及集成迁移相关对常见问题进行了大致的分类。每一类对象下又进行了问题性质的分类，例如：功能缺失，操作和实施以及配置相关问题等。客户可以点击下方链接查看到相关问题。

Contents

API

  • 功能缺失相关问题
  • 操作和实施相关问题

CDS View

  • 功能缺失相关问题
  • 操作和实施相关问题

自定义字段和逻辑

  • 功能缺失相关问题
  • 操作和实施相关问题

集成相关

  • 操作和实施相关问题

迁移相关

  • 操作和实施相关问题

 

 API

功能缺失相关问题

 

  • 问题：客户咨询是否有API可以支持采购订单外部审批的。

解答：采购订单需要在我的收件箱里被审批。审批者需要检查采购订单的必要详细信息，才能决定是批准还是拒绝。如果确实需要这样的功能，可以通过Customer Influence Portal来提交新的请求。

 

  • 问题：外部WMS系统通过API API_INSPECTIONLOT_SRV集成到S4HC系统。当通过移动类型103对采购订单做收货动作的时候，检验批被创建。客户希望创建batch number，然后更新到检验批上面。客户觉得在前台GUI QA02是可以更新batch number，但是API做不到。

解答：现在通过API API_INSPECTIONLOT_SRV来更新batch的时候会报错QA556 "Update for field BATCH not supported by this function"。目前，这个功能在API里面不支持。

 

操作和实施相关问题

 

  • 问题：客户调用接口API_PURCHASEREQ_PROCESS_SRV/A_PurchaseRequisitionItem?$format=json，会抛出500 error。但是如果移掉参数$format=json就不会有问题。

解答：抛出的错误"TOO_LARGE_BODY"是因为HTTP response太大，相关的参数是（icm/HTTP/max_request size MB），建议加上参数$top来限制返回的数量，例如A_PurchaseRequisitionItem?$format=json&$top=100。

具体可参见Note https://me.sap.com/notes/0003366726。

 

  • 问题：客户想要下载App 维护零税申报里的数据，想要问有没有相关的API或者CDS？

App地址是https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('IDTW_EXP_ZERO_TAX')/S31

解答：没有找到这个App相关的CDS或者API可以公布给客户。

 

  • 问题：客户调用交货单API出错，链接如下：

https://myxx.saps4hanacloud.cn:443/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV

解答：正确的API调用的URL都应该在hostname后面包含api后缀，正确的链接大致如下：https://my123456-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_XYZ_SRV

 

 

CDS View

操作和实施相关问题

 

  • 问题：客户调用自定义CDS读取数据，在测试系统中数据读取正常，但是在生产系统中数据显示重复。

解答：需要重新检查扩展数据源的join条件。比如扩展数据源A有键值A1和A2，但是A在与主数据源X组成join条件时，只写了X1=A1，没有包括A2。这会导致结果是1:n，而不是1:1。

 

  • 问题：为什么CDS视图中的自定义字段没有显示最新的值？

解答：需要留意视图中字段取数逻辑。确保视图取的数据为更新表单中自定义字段。

 

  • 问题：创建自定义 CDS 报表时，无论是标准 CDS、多维数据集、维度、主要数据源还是关联数据源，客户都无法使用标准 CDS：I_ GoodsMovementDocumentDEX，并且未找到合适的替换 CDS。

解答：按“建议的数据源”过滤搜索结果。要查看其他数据源，请单击显示过滤器，然后将建议的数据源的过滤器设置为“否”。

 

  • 问题：客户在之前的CDS视图中有使用I_AccountingDocumentJournal作主数据源，但现在在创建新的自定义CDS视图时，却不可以选择I_AccountingDocumentJournal作为主数据源。

解答：CDS 视图可用于许多不同的场景。

I_AccountingDocumentJournal 已标识为要用作Analytical Provider，而不是 CDS 建模数据源。这意味着客户可以在该视图之上构建自定义 CDS 查询，但不能构建自定义 CDS。

如果要基于会计凭证项目构建自定义 CDS，则可以改用 CSD I_JournalEntryItem。它将提供与 I_AccountingDocumentJournal 相同的信息，旨在用作自定义 CDS 的主要数据源。

此外，之前建好的自定义 CDS 视图不会受特征引入的影响。

 

  • 问题：在生产系统中传输 CDS 视图后，cds任务优先级显示不正确，在 P 系统中仍显示为“高”。

解答：测试系统/定制租户中自定义 CDS 视图的返工任务直接在发布流程中统计。而在生产系统中，返工任务不会立即更新状态，会由每周日晚上进行重复作业。

 

  • 问题：发布自定义 CDS 视图 时出错。“已忽略字段X 的关联：字段X的关联不一致”

解答：如果报错字段没有外键或文本关联，请添加指向目标视图的关联。如果存在关联，请调整关联。

 

 

自定义字段和逻辑

操作和实施相关问题

  • 问题：客户需要修改自定义逻辑中的某些字段，单击编辑，提示错误，不允许编辑。

解答：在编辑使用已弃用的自定义逻辑应用创建的自定义逻辑之前，需要使用新应用将其发布。

在找到“打开代码编辑器”按钮的屏幕中，可以看到旁边有一个发布按钮。请先选择发布自定义逻辑。

 

集成相关

操作和实施相关问题

  • 问题：第三方系统在调用API API_PROD_ORDER_CONFIRMATION_2_SRV做报工操作的时候，提示“返回信息为:CSRF token validation failed”。虽然提示这个信息，但存在发生物料货物移动，比如会执行工序0010,0020,0030成功，但是0040不成功，如果重复执行 会重复报工 重复料耗。

解答：建议客户每次deregister token，然后在下一次使用前再次拿新的token。可参考API Call的Best Practice Note：https://me.sap.com/notes/3201227

 

  • 问题：客户通过 https://my-api.s4hana.sapcloud.cn/sap/bc/srt/scs_ext/sap/fixedassetchange 通过接口修改固定资产信息时，当例程数据、时间相关数据和评估数据多次异步传输时，可能会导致某些数据值不会被修改。但是，在监控仪表盘中，可以看到接口已成功接收并且存在数据。如果只是单个异步值传输和单独的时间传输，则不会出现问题。

解答：请注意，使用 API 固定资产 - 更改（异步） 时，无法在同一 SOAP 请求中多次更改同一固定资产。

请参阅帮助文档链接：https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/5bcca49998834de2b5533c36602e52a2/aa0664be3f3a45179d23675ba8c17103.html#constraints

 

迁移相关

操作和实施相关问题

  • 问题：客户使用迁移对象“产品 - 按新组织级别扩展现有记录”导入数据时，发生错误“上载文件中缺少自定义属性 LANGUAGE”。

解答：检查客户的源文件，发现文件里包含如下信息

<Font ss:FontName="宋体" x:CharSet="134" ss:Size="12" ss:Color="#000000"/>

在黏贴数据时，要只贴值，不能把格式给拷贝到导入文件中。具体可参见以下Note：

https://me.sap.com/notes/3350877/E

https://me.sap.com/notes/2692715/E

 

 

以上为本次分享的全部内容。若想要了解往期更多有关集成扩展的常问问题，可以点击下方链接进行查看：

 

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2022年01月 – 2022年03月）：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2022年04月 – 2022年06月）：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2022年07月 – 2022年09月）：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2022年10月 – 2022年12月)：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2023年01月 – 2023年03月)：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2023年04月 – 2023年06月)：click here.

entry.title: Re: Bug in Access Control SP23?
entry.content:
Novella,

Please check the Note:
3427859 - "Unknown error during login" in centralized EAM

Regards,
Raj

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 3
entry.content: I will do my best 😅

entry.title: Re: Reaching shipment cost (LE-TRA) processing via Fiori?
entry.content:
Hi Hbayram, You should review SAP Note 3097176 - Migration from SAP ERP or SAP LE-TRA to SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management, and SAP Note 2270199 - S4TWL - Transportation (LE-TRA)

LE-TRA is being superseded by SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management. 

You can still use the LE-TRA transactions from the Fiori launchpad at the moment. However, all new functionality will be in Transportation Management.

entry.title: Not Able to open Account explorer
entry.content:
Hello All,

Not able to open my sub-account getting message 

"

Sorry, we're currently unable to access this subaccount. Please try again later. If the issue persists, contact support for assistance.
"
Where to reach for support?
 
Regards,
Ummar Rasheed

entry.title: Re: How to set logic validation, when supplier invoice is...
entry.content: Hello.

entry.title: Re: How to set logic validation, when supplier invoice is...
entry.content: There is not sample code for reverse in the BADI MRM_CHECK_INVOICE_CLOUD. Action are for posting, delete, park and so on , where Create Supplier invoice app shows. Please, let us know which event is for reverse? to use for reverse?

entry.title: Re: BEx Query Designer with SAP GUI 8.00 64bit and Office...
entry.content: Hi Sebastian, we did it the other way round: first did the installation auf SAPGUI 64bit and afterwards we installed BEx Suite 32bit. And QueryDesinger is working! Thanks, best regards

entry.title: Re: BEx Query Designer with SAP GUI 8.00 64bit and Office...
entry.content: Hi Sebastian, The Note referred you, to whether MS Office 64-bit is supported or not in BW Front End Add-On.

entry.title: Re: Reaching shipment cost (LE-TRA) processing via Fiori?
entry.content: Hello, Jocelyn thank you for your answer. I review the notes you sent but my problem is reaching to this t code via Fiori. As you said if I can still use LE-TRA transactions from the Fiori launchpad why I can not reac to VI** tcodes from fiori? But I can reach apps releated to VT** tcodes.

entry.title: Re: native report showing on-the-fly SO Ship-To
entry.content: Is it possible to achieve this using ABAP code. The need is to change ship-to-address from VA02 and verify the same using external API and modify the address via user exit, badi or anything

Hi,

Have you find any solution for this? as i am also facing the same issue

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Not Able to open Account explorer

Hi,

same problem on our side, mainly datacenter eu10

Best regards,

Sascha

entry.title: Our customer has a requirement to have HRBP and Manager roles different.
entry.content:
Our customer has a requirement to have HRBP and Manager roles different. HRBP should have only View Permission and no assignment permission. Whereas Manager should have all permissions. 

Need pointers on how to achieve this?

entry.title: How to create a new purchasing group to assign a person?
entry.content: How to create a new purchasing group to assign a person to save development system to move with help of TR to production system?

entry.title: Re: where to check administrative data - Account Group in...
entry.content: @Lakshmipathi got it, thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: Configuring the User Information Section - Performance Management
entry.content:
Hi shreyashrangrej

Please launch a new form to confirm whether the custom field could show in form.
If can't, please create a support case with component LOD-SF-PM-FRM to get further support.

KBA:2511723 - Configuring the User Information Section - Performance Management - SAP for Me

Thanks
Marisa

entry.title: Re: Not Able to open Account explorer
entry.content: Same problem here.

entry.title: ABAP Logic for Splitting one record with Validfrom and ValidTo into n numbers based on month
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can someone please help me in getting the logic to split one record with ValidFrom and ValidTo into n number of records based on calmonth. Below is the one example 

Source :

ProductValidFromValidToAmount
P10012024010120240430100

Target : 

PRODUCTCALMONTHAmount
P1001202401100
P1001202402100
P1001202403100
P1001202404100

 

Regards,

Praveen.

entry.title: Re: One story report for Goals, Activities, and Achievements
entry.content:
Hello @jeonghyun1 ,

You can try creating a cross-domain ad-hoc report.

1- Choose Goal Management as the primary domain and add the below fields:

Goal Owner User ID or Goal Owner Username, and Goal Name

2- Choose Continue Performance Management as a secondary domain and add the below fields:

Activity Name, Activity Status, Achievement Name, and Achievement Date

3- Select other filter in people tab

3- Create a relationship using the Goal owner user ID and User information: User Sys ID

entry.title: Re: How to give solving priority to calculated measure ov...
entry.content:
@Sorro 

Under structure priority you have custom priority options. Once enabled, In the calculation measure designer section in modeler view, you can set custom priority of various calculated accounts and calculated measures.

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Problem with data types of DOX Payment Advice Data Ty...
entry.content:
Hi @TillHeinen

How did you see get to Document information extraction screen? Where are you performing the annotations?

Also, if you are annotating in SBPA template editor then, while annotating netAmount, is it fetching the correct value in the template editor?

Kind Regards,

Eshita

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Distribute Budget equally to 12...
entry.content:
@rachugh 

You can write a Data Action to distribute the total budget numbers equally to months. Simply divide the total budget by 12 and post it to months. As your total budget is also on months may be you can just separate the data intersection for the total budget and monthly distribution for reconciliation purpose in case of distribution errors.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: How to give solving priority to calculated measure ov...
entry.content:
Hi,

Both Measures & Accounts should be at [created in] the Model Level, not at the Story Level.
And try checking the data[preview] at the Model Level Calculations. If it is the issue at the Model Level, then it should be checked at the Model Level. If it is correct at the Model Level, need to look into the issue at the Story Level. If you feel, it is the issue with product then need to raise ticket to SAP.

Thanks, Siva.

entry.title: Workflow Receiver FM: SWW_WI_CREATE_VIA_EVENT_IBF or SWW_WI_CREATE_VIA_EVENT
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone tell me when to use one or the other of these FMs : SWW_WI_CREATE_VIA_EVENT_IBF or SWW_WI_CREATE_VIA_EVENT?

I see that SWW_WI_CREATE_VIA_EVENT_IBF is based on an XML feed but in what context can we use it? I can't find any documentation on this.

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Re: SCT SFM Import: No Data Available
entry.content:
You would need to fulfill all requirements to have the data show up here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUS_SCT/351dea6ee9e343ffae825153b95671d6/f383885610f34303abf66c1bd88976a4.html

  • Configure the destination in your SAP BTP subaccount for SAP Sustainability Control Tower with the URL and credentials from the SAP Sustainability Footprint Management service instance.
  • Maintain the plants you have stored in SAP Sustainability Footprint Management as business locations in SAP Sustainability Control Tower. For more information on business locations, see Concepts.
  • Make the footprints available for external communication in SAP Sustainability Footprint Management. To do so, see Integrating with SAP Sustainability Control Tower.

entry.title: Re: Can you convert an Enable Now Web Recording into Mp4
entry.content: Hi Shane, thank you for those details, however its not the simulation I want to generate the MP4 its the relatively new feature of recording a video (via Manager) that you can include audio and an in screen web cam of yourself on the recording. I have asked before so I know you can't edit these in Enable Now but is there any way to convert these to MP4? Thanks

entry.title: Re: ASCS pse certificates expiration monitoring
entry.content:
Dear customer,

In System Monitoring standard template SAP ABAP Central Services, only following two metrics are available to monitor ASCS availability:

ABAP Enqueue Server Status

ABAP Message Server Status

No certificates metrics available now in standard template SAP ABAP Central Services.

Best regards,

Ava

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Distribute Budget equally to 12...
entry.content: Thanks Nikhil. I would really appreciate if you can help with sample code.

entry.title: Re: Problem with data types of DOX Payment Advice Data Ty...
entry.content:
Hi @eshita_mahajan 

How did you see get to Document information extraction screen?

--> From our own Dox I was checking the predelivered schemas for payment advices.

Where are you performing the annotations?

--> I am not sure what you mean with annotations. I am just using the predelivered DOX schema and the data type given in DOX SDK for SPBA.

Also, if you are annotating in SBPA template editor then, while annotating netAmount, is it fetching the correct value in the template editor?

--> I am not using a template, I am using the DOX SDK activity: Extract Data (Pre-trained Model)

In the automation I am matching my own data type Payment advice(items), as shown in the last screenshot of the previous post.

Thanks for your quick reply.

Regards 

Till

entry.title: Re: Cancel/Delete SAP note

entry.title: Re: How to create the variant with dynamic selections using abap program

entry.title: Cloud Integration: Switch iflow Type
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

is it possible to switch the iflow type from "REST API" to "Integration Flow" ?

I do not want to build a new one from scratch. 

In my understanding, the only difference is, that REST API necessarily has to have a HTTPS Sender-Adapter.

And my requirements changed to "ProcessDirect".

Thanks in Advance.

Simon

Renumbering G/L Accounts: Before You Start

entry.title: Flexible Programming Model
entry.content:
I've been trying to implement a table with FLP that toggles between editable and non editable on button click.

My first problem is that even when I set readOnly to false the cells look editable but arent.

And my secound proble is, when I change the "readOnly" value via the controller, nothing happens.

The documentation does not include the controller.

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/buildingBlocks/table/tableEdit

I found the controller and it seems to set a model that is not bound to the page and when I comment it out the functionality doesn't change.

Any help is appreciated.

entry.title: Gestión de efectos: Presentación de remesa
entry.content:
Hola a todos!

Tengo un problema con la gestión de efectos. En un usuario en concreto no le aparecen en la ventana de gestión de efectos los mismos efectos en la pestaña presentado o pagado que otros usuarios por lo que no los puede presentar. Los filtros empleados son los mismos.

Creo que no tiene nada que ver con los permisos ya que antes si podía y no tenía problemas y ahora no le aparecen.

¿Alguien tiene alguna idea de por que puede estar ocurriendo esto?

 Cuando lo lleva de creado a presentado, no se ve ya el efecto y tampoco deja pagar el mismo

Gracias, saludos!!

entry.title: SAC story with text end character cut when exported to PDF, anyone has a work around?
entry.content:
Hi

we developed a story that is delivered to end users by email, broadcasting in pdf format. When in pdf mode some final letters are but.

Anyone has a work around for this?

entry.title: Re: Compensation issues troubleshooting step by step
entry.content: FYI @xavierlegarrec In the end I sovled it by mapping the Employee Class to the Code and used the picklist codes in the guidelines.

entry.title: Upload functionality for debit/credit material (MR22)
entry.content: Apps "Manage material valuaiton" provides the function "Debit/Credit Material" but i can't find  upload functionality.  The MR22 upload functionality is useful during inventory data migration with scope item 33Q(Actual costing). Is there any workaround or will it release in the near future.

entry.title: Re: To use variable name as field name
entry.content:
The following code is wrong because text-001 is for translatable texts but a field name should not be translated:

* anti-pattern
DATA(field_name_1) = text-001.
DATA(field_name_zmatnr) = 'ZMATNR'(001).

The following code is correct if the field name is used only once in the code (despite the "historic tendency in ABAP to wrap every literal in constants" (styleguides/clean-abap/CleanABAP.md at main · SAP/styleguides (github.com))):

DATA(field_name) = `ZMATNR`.

The following code is correct according to "There is a historic tendency in ABAP to wrap every literal in constants" (styleguides/clean-abap/CleanABAP.md at main · SAP/styleguides (github.com)) or if the field name is used more than once in the program:

CONSTANTS:
  BEGIN OF alv_field_names,
    zbatch TYPE string VALUE `ZBATCH`,
    zmatnr TYPE string VALUE `ZMATNR`,
  END OF alv_field_names.

 

  •  "It is of course acceptable to repeat the constant's value if it is already descriptive enough" (styleguides/clean-abap/CleanABAP.md at main · SAP/styleguides (github.com))
  • "If you cannot use enumerations and have to collect constants in a loose way, for example in an interface, at least group them" (styleguides/clean-abap/CleanABAP.md at main · SAP/styleguides (github.com))

There is a last solution where you get the name by combining RTTS and DESCRIBE DISTANCE, which you have to code yourself as I don't have the code available right now:

CONSTANTS alv_fields TYPE ... " any structure
DATA(alv_field_names) = zcl_abap_get_comp_names=>create( alv_fields ).
DATA(alv_field_name_zmatnr) = alv_field_names->get( alv_fields-zmatnr ).

Hope you got the info! Let me know if any more details required.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Logic for Splitting one record with Validfrom and ValidTo into n numbers based on month
entry.content: Isn't it a loop from 01 to 04? It seems trivial. What is your issue? What did you try? Do you want us to code it for you?

entry.title: What type and number of qualifications are required for external sales of SAP BTP?
entry.content: I wanna know what type and number of qualifications are required for external sales of SAP BTP.

entry.title: Instance specific Authority Control in SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management
entry.content:
Primary use case is for the customers (Shippers)  using SAP Transportation Management in SAP S/4HANA to procure Transport Services from logistics service providers during their Inbound and Outbound Logistics processes. In most of the cases the customers (Shippers) plan and execute Freight Orders and Freight Bookings in the Transportation Management module. In many cases the Shipper provides system access to those users who are external (example employee of Logistics company with whom the Shipper has business dealings) and Shipper would like to restrict activities of this user.

User Role with Authorization profile is the basis to control the access of such users, but sometimes it is not enough and customers need to influence the access based on very specific logic. In such cases it is required to base the logic on a specific document (being accessed by the user) and the data inside the document to decide if and what the user will be allowed to do or see. This is why it is called "Instance Specific Authority Check"

BADI /SCMTMS/BADI_AC_DEF has a new method ADJUST_AUTH_CONTEXT().  The new method can be used to adjust the authorization check context before the authorization check is executed in Transportation Management for a single instance.

  • IV_AUTHORITY_OBJECT: Brings the Authorization Objects
  • IV_KEY: Instance key, for which the authorization check is performed (Example Freight Order Root Key)
  • CS_CTX: Authorization context. Below information can be adjusted:
    • ACTIVITY: Activity, with which the authorization check will be executed.
    • BO_SERVICE: The content of the field BO_SERVICE. 

Important OSS notes to be considered:

  • 2890717 - TM Authorization Check in SAP S/4HANA
  • 3441660 - No possibility to influence Activity / BO_SERVICE instance specifically

My customer wanted to restrict the view to Charges related information and activities related to Subcontracting in the Freight Order for specific Carrier Business Partners assigned. (controlled vai T_TOR_EXE and T_TOR_PUR authorization objects)

The BADI method gives a good flexibility to achieve similar requirements going forward.

entry.title: Re: Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report (BRSR) in Nutshell

Patrik

entry.title: Re: Hide Save Button (BTP, RAP)
entry.content: @MioYasuatke! Thanks, this solved my problem.

entry.title: Re: Delete IMG Enhamcenemt ID Problem
entry.content:
It's possibly related to the locks (table TLOCK) of deleted objects as they were assigned to transport requests, and they still have object directory entries in table TADIR = looks like a lot like the deletion of "unused" development packages (1156585 - How to delete packages - SAP for Me).

The solution would be to release the transport request or remove its entries (so that the locks are removed) and you can then delete the Enhancement ID.

entry.title: Re: Instance Local Http Availability Showing False Alert
entry.content:
Hi Paiyu,

Since the metric is using the LMDB information to create the URL + Port of the system to execute the ping I would kindly ask you to check whether the LMDB system data for the Managed System is correctly maintained. Especially please check whether the application server is correctly maintained and if the FQDN + Port information is available. (icm/server_port_*)

Last but not least (but I guess you have checked this already) I would kindly ask you to check whether /sap/public/ping is active in SICF on the affected instance.

Best regards
Stefan
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Node.js on HANA Cloud WITH HINT
entry.content:
This is not yet supported in node.js. But there is an experiment from community that works well. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/with-hint-is-highly-needed-in-sap-cap/qaq-p/12547464

But, you are aware of this already.

entry.title: SET CUROSOR FIELD xxx OFFSET yyy doesn't work with filled field and/or without debugging
entry.content:
Hello ABAPers,

My requirement is to get cursor at the end of a field in my dynpro.
So I use (in my PBO):

 

SET CURSOR FIELD my_field OFFSET my_offset.

 

It works well when my field is empty : (for this example, i use 3 as offset (on a 50 field char length) :

But as soon as I filled with content this field, all the content became selected :
Even if a put more or less char than the offset.


I dont want the user to do an action for getting at the end of the field.
Fun fact, if I put a breakpoint anywhere, It works !

I don't understand why.
I have same behaviour in demo program DEMO_DYNPRO_SET_CURSOR.

Thanks for any help.

entry.title: Re: Can recognize # as one of combination of CR?
entry.content:
Hi,

please check

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/characteristic-relationship-on-dso/qaq-p/818748?search-action-id=45465195047&search-result-uid=818748

The value '#' is the (external representation) of the unassigned value, i.e. the value is initial. You can search this forum based 'automatically valid combinations' and/or 'EXCL #' to find many threads about this topic.

Regards,

Gregor

entry.title: Re: JCo IDoc send is waiting for IDoc to complete processing
entry.content:
Well, despite of its name, IDOC_INBOUND_ASYNCHRONOUS is synchronous by nature. I think, in the very beginning it used to be asynchronous, but because of performance reasons (it needed two work processes in times, when processes were scarce) it was made synchronous.

However, do not despair, ye troubled souls, there is a way to make it asynchronous again. First for some background information, you need to read SAP notes 535172 and 555229 (and 180057). And then you need to know an undocumented trick:

  • In transaction WE21 create a Port of Type ABAP-PI (ABAP-PSS in German). The function module specified here, is without relevance, so you can for example enter RFC_PING.

  • On sender side (i.e. JCo IDoc Library) set the field SNDPOR of the IDoc control record to this port.

After that, the IDoc will only be written to the EDI data tables, and processing of the application is triggered in a separate work process (meaning it's processed asynchronously)!

entry.title: Re: Missing purpose string in Info.plist
entry.content:
Another report for the same issue.

Eagerly awaiting a fix!

entry.title: Re: Gestión de efectos: Presentación de remesa
entry.content:
Hi,

For the specific user, go to the Bill of Exchange Management window. In the Bill of Exchange Management window, check for field 'Status' and from the drop down, select status 'Deposited'. You will see two additional checkboxes for selection/filter. If any is selected, then remove the same.

Do the same for the status 'paid' in the Bill of Exchange Management window.

Run the Bill of Exchange Management and check if all the BoE's appear or not.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Payment run without postings
entry.content:
HI Bohdan, 

A new point and mostly very well-articulated.  

Best Regards

Raj

entry.title: Gestion de Bancos/Asistente de Pago, Indicar ejecución de orden de pago
entry.content:
Hola, hemos realizando una operación rutinaria, en Gestion de Bancos/Asistente de Pago, hemos seleccionada todo como siempre (Fecha del pago, fechas de vencimiento para filtrar los movimientos) y en el último paso, donde nos solicita el modo en el que se desea procesar los resultados. Siempre escogemos Indicar ejecución de orden de pago. De esta manera si algo sale mal podemos modificarlo previamente antes de contabilizarlo y no hay que volver atrás movimientos erróneos.

Pero esta vez para nuestra sorpresa tras filtrar los pagos negativos y dejar los proveedores que necesitamos nos ha saltado este error.

“Ejecución de todas las líneas en ejecución de orden de pago fallida. Véase el informe "Transacciones no incluidas"  [Mensaje 504-149]”

Y al darle al menu de Transacciones no incluidas, no ha salido un informe, sino que sale otro error.

“La fecha no está disponible; modifique los criterios de selección y vuelva a introducirlos  [Mensaje 131-85]”

Tras reiniciar servidor incluido y ver que no había solución hemos probado por grupos de clientes y finalmente hemos revisado que La moneda del proveedor coincide a la del banco. Existen suficientes fondos en el banco asignado al pago. El proveedor o socio de negocio está activo. Lo mismo que las Cuentas.

Hemos probado todo igual, excepto que en el paso donde indicamos el modo en el que se desea procesar los resultados. Hemos seleccionado Indicar ejecución de pago. En este caso nos ha realizado la operación y no sabemos por qué. En este caso se ejecutan más pasos como el registro de todas las órdenes, contabilización de los pagos y seguramente más cosas.

No sabemos a que es debido este cambio en el comportamiento del programa y si podemos usar la opción anterior de nuevo. Si alguien sabe mas sobre este punto o puede aclarar algún concepto estaríamos agradecidos.

entry.title: Re: Header fields of savings form to be used on condition
entry.content: I don't believe so, as conditions typically can only be used within their object. However, you can always check with your deployment lead if the header field from your savings tracker can be replicated and linked in the Contract Workspace. In that case you should be able to use the condition for contract creation.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano  

My name is Vedant Shete and I am currently pursuing Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering department.

This is a golden opportunity for students like me and I want to appreciate for this incredible opportunity offered by SAP. As a student, the cost of certification can be exorbitant, difficult to access such valuable learning resources. However, this chance to obtain a SAP certification for free truly underscore its value.

With the C_SAC_2402 Data Analytics course, I see not just a certification, but an epochal milestone. It's not just about adding a shining badge to my resume; it's more about unlocking doors to great opportunities, shaping my future, and propelling me towards my goals.
Therefore, I extend my heartfelt gratitude. Thank you for your belief in the students like myself, for your investment in our potential, and making our futures bright by such opportunities.

Warm regards,
Vedant Shete

entry.title: Having SWIFT code mandatory in SLP
entry.content:
Hello community,

We are looking to make the SWIFT code mandatory in SLP bank repeatable section. We received response from support that this was not possible. We are now looking at other options e.g. having SWIFT code & IBAN outside the bank repeatable section. If you faced a similar issue in the past we would appreciate sharing how you worked around this limitation.

Kind regards,

Louis

entry.title: SAP APO DP Planning version bug.
entry.content:
Dear experts sometimes i am facing a problem that after process chain

1) Create CVC

2)Initialize   time series objects, 

3) Adjust time series,

4) Check time series.

5)It starts to load  planning data from cube, and fails with the message "Version 000 does not exist for planning area ZDP90".

But after i restart cube loading step manually it works perfectly.

This happens sometimes and I do not know what it depends on, maybe someone can help me?

entry.title: Re: PREP_GENCHECKS/EU_NAMETAB_CHECK Error during upgrade...
entry.content:
Hi, 
I had the same problem. The problem was that there were differences between DD and DB. It was enough to delete the data in the DBDIFF table, preferably via SE11 Utilities>>Database Utilities>>Clean Data
Zdenek

entry.title: Re: SET CUROSOR FIELD xxx OFFSET yyy doesn't work with filled field and/or without debugging
entry.content: Try the SAP GUI options related to cursor.

entry.title: Unlocking Efficiency and Simplicity: A Look into the New Features of SAP Fiori Elements for OData V4
entry.content:
In the ever-evolving landscape of enterprise software, staying ahead of the curve is not just an advantage, it's a necessity. As we look at SAP Fiori elements, exciting developments  help you to strive, particularly with the features from SAPUI5 Version 1.121 and SAP Fiori elements for OData V4. This latest iteration promises to enhance the capabilities of Fiori elements even further, offering a host of new functionalities and improvements.

Here's a look into some of the latest features for SAP Fiori elements for OData V4:

Recently Entered Values: Have you ever wished for a quicker way to access recently entered values in a field? Well, your wish is granted! We've introduced a handy feature that allows you to view the history of the most recently entered values right within the filter bar.

By simply moving your cursor back to the field, you can enable this time-saving function. While it's automatically activated for controls where it is relevant, like multi-input fields, it might not be enabled for others such as drop-down lists.

With this enhancement, navigating through your data becomes even more efficient, putting valuable information at the top. For more information, see History of Recently Entered Values.

Open Object Page in Edit Mode: One of the standout features in this update is the introduction of the 'openInEditMode' manifest setting. This addition empowers developers by allowing them to open an object page directly in edit mode. Gone are the days of navigating through multiple screens to make a simple edit; now, users can seamlessly transition to edit mode with just a click. For more information, see Navigating to an Object Page in Edit Mode.

Merged Section and Subsection Title: The section or subsection title is now merged with the table or chart title if the section or subsection only has one table or chart control. That way, redundant information is omitted. For more information, see Defining and Adapting Sections.

For all changes, see the What’s New in SAPUI5 1.121 section ‘SAP Fiori elements for OData V4’

entry.title: Unable to connect BAS to S4HANA Public Cloud system
entry.content:
Hello ,

I am trying to connect BAS to a S4HANA public cloud system using SAML assertion destination , by following tutorial : Connect SAP Business Application Studio and SAP S/4HANA Cloud System 

In destination cockpit the destination connects successfully . However , when I am trying to connect to the system ( saml destination ) in BAS ( using adaption project ) , I am getting following error : The system that you have selected cannot be detected to be of type OnPremise or of type CloudReady. You should select system of either of both types in order to continue with the generation of the project.

Is there any configuration that I am missing in the S4HANA cloud system .

entry.title: Re: FIN-FSCM-CR ( Credit Management )-Credit Exposure Category Type 200 (Open Invoices)
entry.content: Hello Emöke, thanks for mentioning the SAP note - very useful! 🙂 Best regards, Carina

entry.title: Re: Consuming CDS View Entities Using ODBC-Based Client Tools
entry.content:
CLIENT=100 worked in my DSN example although I connected to an SAP BTP ABAP Environment system.
In general you should not specify this parameter for an ABAP cloud system. On OnPrem systems it is required.

entry.title: Re: Ignore Hard coding in S4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, the possible solution is to avoid hardcode in Custom Logic using custom constant interface. It`s using will be not avaiable in the app initially, so you need to release the interface at first to make it avaiable for using. Follow such steps:

  1. Create and activate a constant interface in your system.
  2. Navigate to it`s propeties and click on API State tab. 

  3. Click on green '+' icon on the Use System-Internally (Contract C1) tab.

  4. Select Use in Key User Apps checkbox and click on Next until the end of a dialogue.

     

  5. That`s all, now you are able to use the interface in the Custom Logic App. 

It will work for custom classes as well, so you also can create some kind of singletone buffer-class to store dynamic values. That`s up to your needs.

entry.title: Verwendung des BRTOOLS für Shrinken einer LOB Tabelle vor der Reorg.
entry.content:
Für die Reorganisierung der Tabelle muss vorerst die verknüpfte LOB Tabelle über einen SHRINK Befehl verkleinert werden.

Im normalen DBA Umfeld wäre es dieses Kommando:

ALTER TABLE <table> MODIFY LOB(DATEN) (SHRINK SPACE);

 

Bei SAP Datenbanken soll das BRTOOLS verwendet werden. Die Frage ist, wie das richtig Vorgehen ist, um die LOB Tabelle zu shrinken?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Verwendung des BRTOOLS für Shrinken einer LOB Tabelle...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

With BR*Tools there is no restriction for LOB fields. Only the LONG and LONG RAW fields should be converted into LOB.

You can reorganize the LOB columns with BRSAPCE without shrinking.

Please check below note for more information:

646681 - Reorganization of tables with BRSPACE

Best regards,
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Issue with adaption project in BAS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

We are having an issue with adaption project in BAS.

We are trying to extend a standard Fiori app called "Pack Outbound Deliveries" .  When we open it from the launchpad , it works fine with the user default values. But when we try to open it in BAS, it keeps asking us to set up those user defaults again and again, which is not possible.

It is stuck on the first page itself , but we need to get to the second page to add some new elements using the layout editor.

Could you please help us with this query?

entry.content:
Hello Experts,

we are unable to access the subaccount in the Europe (Frankfurt) region and getting the below issue.

Note : We are able to access the subaccount of Australia region.

Could you please give us any suggestion and help us on this issue.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

currently the intercompany supplier invoice is always createdy by VCM automatically after the goods receipt has been posted in the selling copmany and the ICo customer invoice has been transferred to financial accounting.

We are aware that in some business scenarios it's necessary to stop this automatic creation of the ICo supplier invoice that is not possible in the moment.

We are working on a solution design that enables customers to decide if the automatic creation of the IC supplier invoice by VCM is enabled or disabled.

We plan to share more details in the coming months / quarters.

Best regards,
Bernd

Ahmed

entry.title: Re: Call SeriesService_GetDocumentSeries in Service Layer...
entry.content:
Looks you can't directly call the SeriesService_GetDocumentSeries as it's not exposed as a RESTful API.
May you can retrieve the document series by querying the 'Series' entity.

entry.title: Re: SET CUROSOR FIELD xxx OFFSET yyy doesn't work with filled field and/or without debugging
entry.content:
Well, I was not sure. Finally, you answered by yourself so you can post your own answer, and accept your solution 😉

Or maybe I can post the screenshot in English.

entry.title: Re: HANA CV Filter: Process Multi-entry Pattern Input Par...
entry.content: The `LIKE_PREDICATE` function in SAP HANA enables the processing of multiple pattern values within a single filter expression in the Calculation View. This function allows you to use multiple patterns in a single filter expression.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Logic for Splitting one record with Validfrom an...
entry.content:
You can put ValidFrom and ValidTo in a SPMON typped variables (spmon_from,spmon_to).

spmon_from = ValidFrom(6).

Increment of 1 for spmon_from until you reach spmon_to value.

entry.title: Configuration for Label Printing in SSAM 2310
entry.content: As per SSAM 2310 we have Label printing support  which can be enabled through output determination. Can we have any documentation  or blogs link on how to achieve this.
